children.heading: DTS Network
children.label: 1 DTS Network
children.text: The term “DTS Network” means the worldwide telecommunications network supporting all United States Government agencies and departments operating from diplomatic and consular facilities outside of the United States.

children.heading: DTS–PO
children.label: 2 DTS–PO
children.text: The term “DTS–PO” means the Diplomatic Telecommunications Service Program Office.

children.heading: Governance Board
children.label: 3 Governance Board
children.text: The term “Governance Board” means the Diplomatic Telecommunications Service Governance Board established under .section 7302(a)(1) of this title
